# Ondo Real Estate

> Utah-focused brokerage, mortgage, notary, and property management. Invite-only dashboards for managers, owners, and tenants live in a separate app from this marketing site.

## Canonical site
- Marketing site: https://ondorealestate.com/
- HTML sitemap (all public pages): https://ondorealestate.com/sitemap/
- XML sitemap: https://ondorealestate.com/sitemap.xml
- This file: https://ondorealestate.com/llms.txt

## Product areas
- **Buy / mortgage**: Purchase guides, loan pre-approval, conventional and specialty products, refinance process, Utah city/ZIP loan pages.
- **Sell**: Listing strategy, staging context, seller calculators.
- **Rent & manage**: Property search, rentals inventory, full-service property management for landlords.
- **Invest**: Registered opportunities, fractional and commercial education, per-deal detail pages.
- **Notary**: Remote online notarization (RON), loan signings, mobile notary, estate and employer packages.
- **Tools**: Mortgage, affordability, refinance, and investor calculators under `/calculators/`.

## Authenticated product (not this repo’s public pages)
- Manager, owner, and tenant portals: https://app.ondorealestate.com
- Portal login: https://app.ondorealestate.com/login
Access is invitation-only; there is no self-serve signup on the marketing site.

## Contact (humans)
- Phone: +1-408-538-0420
- General: info@ondorealestate.com
- Mortgage: mortgage@ondorealestate.com
- Notary: notary@ondorealestate.com
- Media: media@ondorealestate.com

## Major public paths

### Home & company story
- Home: https://ondorealestate.com/ — Ondo Real Estate — buy, sell, finance, manage, and notarize with one partner.
- Founders letter: https://ondorealestate.com/founders-letter/ — Why we built Ondo and how we work with owners and residents.
- Why Utah: https://ondorealestate.com/why-utah/ — Economy, quality of life, and real estate context in Utah.

### Buy & finance
- Buy a home: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/ — Purchase overview and next steps.
- First-time home buyer: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/first-time/ — Programs and guidance for first-time buyers.
- Second home: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/second-home/ — Financing and considerations for a second residence.
- Mortgage rates hub: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/rates/ — Rate context and how we quote.
- Fixed-rate mortgages: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/fixed-rate/ — Predictable payments with fixed-rate loans.
- Adjustable-rate mortgages: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/adjustable-rate/ — ARM structure, caps, and when it can fit.
- 30-year mortgage: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/30-year/ — Lower payment, longer amortization.
- 15-year mortgage: https://ondorealestate.com/buy/15-year/ — Build equity faster with a shorter term.
- Mortgage loans: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/ — Pre-approval, products, and Utah loan guidance.
- Conventional loans: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/conventional/ — Conforming conventional purchase and refinance.
- FHA loans: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/fha/ — 3.5% down at 580+ FICO — credit-flexible financing for Utah buyers.
- VA loans: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/va/ — Zero down for eligible veterans and active-duty military in Utah.
- USDA loans: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/usda/ — Zero down in eligible Utah rural areas including Cache Valley and Sanpete County.
- Jumbo loans: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/jumbo/ — Financing above conforming limits for Park City, Draper, and Utah's high-value markets.
- Refinance process: https://ondorealestate.com/refinance/process/ — Steps and timeline to refinance with Ondo.

### Local mortgage & market pages
- Loans in Salt Lake City: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/salt-lake-city/ — Local mortgage context for SLC.
- Loans in Lehi: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/lehi/ — Silicon Slopes and Utah County lending.
- Loans in Provo: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/provo/ — Purchase and refinance in Provo.
- Loans in Draper: https://ondorealestate.com/loans/draper/ — South Valley loan resources.
- Buy/sell by city (example: Lehi): https://ondorealestate.com/buy-sell/lehi/ — Hyper-local buy and sell snapshot; more cities available via URL pattern.
- Buy/sell by ZIP (example: 84043): https://ondorealestate.com/buy-sell/zip/84043/ — ZIP-level market hub; substitute other Utah ZIPs in the path.

### Sell & invest
- Sell your home: https://ondorealestate.com/sell/ — Pricing, prep, and listing with Ondo.
- Investments overview: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/ — How we surface vetted opportunities.
- Investment opportunities: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/opportunities/ — Browse open and waitlisted offerings.
- Fractional real estate: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/fractional/ — Lower minimums and diversified exposure.
- Commercial real estate: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/commercial-real-estate/ — CRE education and sponsor-led deals.
- Lehi Tech Corridor Office Complex: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/lehi-tech-corridor-office/ — A 48,000 sq ft Class A office building in Silicon Slopes with 92% occupancy and tenants including two publicly traded tech firms. The property benefits from pro…
- Provo Student Housing Complex: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/provo-student-housing-complex/ — A 120-unit student housing property adjacent to Brigham Young University with consistent demand driven by enrollment growth. The property was renovated in 2022 …
- Salt Lake Industrial Distribution Center: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/salt-lake-industrial-warehouse/ — A 120,000 sq ft distribution warehouse near the Salt Lake City International Airport with direct freeway access. The facility serves regional logistics for two …
- Draper Medical Office Park: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/draper-medical-office-park/ — A two-building medical office park totaling 32,000 sq ft leased to Intermountain Health affiliates and independent specialists. Located in the Draper corridor w…
- Orem Grocery-Anchored Retail Center: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/orem-grocery-anchored-retail/ — A 65,000 sq ft neighborhood retail center anchored by a national grocery chain with inline tenants including a pharmacy, dental office, and quick-service restau…
- American Fork Climate-Controlled Storage: https://ondorealestate.com/investments/american-fork-self-storage/ — A 450-unit climate-controlled self-storage facility in American Fork serving the north Utah County market. The facility opened in 2021 and has reached stabilize…

### Rent, search & property management
- Property search: https://ondorealestate.com/search/ — Filter rentals and for-sale inventory we market.
- Properties: https://ondorealestate.com/properties/ — Featured homes and apartments available now.
- Property management: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/ — Full-service management for Utah landlords.
- Tenant screening: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/tenant-screening/ — Credit, criminal, eviction, and income verification for Utah rental applicants.
- Maintenance coordination: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/maintenance-coordination/ — End-to-end maintenance request intake, vendor dispatch, and completion tracking.
- Owner reporting: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/owner-reporting/ — Monthly statements, NOI tracking, disbursement history, and document vault.
- Resources: https://ondorealestate.com/resources/ — Guides, downloads, and checklists for owners and renters.
- Templates & forms: https://ondorealestate.com/resources/templates/ — Utah-compliant landlord templates: lease, move-in checklist, maintenance form, and playbook.
- PM in Salt Lake City: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/salt-lake-city/ — Full-service property management in Salt Lake City, UT.
- PM in Provo: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/provo/ — Rental management serving Provo neighborhoods and BYU area.
- PM in Orem: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/orem/ — Rental management in Orem, Utah County.
- PM in Draper: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/draper/ — Property management in Draper, near Silicon Slopes.
- PM in Sandy: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/sandy/ — Sandy rental property management and tenant placement.
- PM in Payson: https://ondorealestate.com/property-management/payson/ — Property management in Payson and southern Utah County.

### Notary & signing
- Notary services: https://ondorealestate.com/notary/ — RON, loan signings, estate packages, and mobile coverage.

### Calculators & planning tools
- All calculators: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/ — Directory of mortgage and investment calculators.
- Mortgage Payment Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/mortgage-payment/ — Estimate monthly mortgage payments with taxes, insurance, and PMI.
- Home Affordability Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/affordability/ — Estimate what home price fits your income, debts, and expenses.
- Required Income Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/income/ — Calculate the income needed to qualify for your target home price.
- Closing Cost Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/closing-cost/ — Estimate buyer closing costs, taxes, and prepaid expenses.
- Refinance Savings Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/refinance/ — Model payment changes and break-even timing for a refinance.
- Home Sale Proceeds Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/home-sale/ — Estimate net proceeds after agent fees, taxes, and payoff.
- Buying Power Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/buying-power/ — See how rate, down payment, and debts change your buying power.
- Temporary Buydown Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/temporary-buydown/ — Model 2-1 or 3-2-1 buydown payment relief and total costs.
- Rent vs Own Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/rent-vs-own/ — Compare long-term costs and equity between renting and owning.
- Retirement Savings Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/retirement/ — Project retirement savings growth and future income needs.
- Cash-on-Cash Return Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/cash-on-cash/ — Calculate cash-on-cash return for an investment property.
- Cap Rate Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/cap-rate/ — Compute capitalization rate from NOI and purchase price.
- ROI Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/roi/ — Measure total ROI for a real estate investment with costs.
- GRM Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/grm/ — Calculate gross rent multiplier from price and rent.
- DSCR Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/dscr/ — Estimate debt service coverage ratio for rental financing.
- 1% Rule Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/one-percent-rule/ — Check if a property's rent meets the 1% rule benchmark.
- 50% Rule Calculator: https://ondorealestate.com/calculators/fifty-percent-rule/ — Estimate expenses quickly using the 50% rental rule.

### FAQ
- FAQ home: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/ — All categories.
- General FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/general-faqs/ — Cross-cutting questions.
- Buying & selling FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/buying-selling-faqs/ — Transaction and offer questions.
- Loan FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/loans-faqs/ — Qualification, rates, and products.
- Loan payoff FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/loan-payoffs-faqs/ — Payoffs and subordination.
- Escrow FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/escrow-faqs/ — Closing and escrow timeline.
- Payment FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/payments-faqs/ — How and when to pay.
- Hardship FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/hardship-faqs/ — Options when finances are tight.
- Disaster FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/disaster-faqs/ — Insurance and property damage.
- Notary FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/notary-faqs/ — RON, I-9, and scheduling.
- Owner FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/owner-faqs/ — Landlord and investor topics.
- Tenant FAQs: https://ondorealestate.com/faq/tenant-faqs/ — Renting and lease questions.

### Blog & guides
- Blog: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/ — Latest articles and filters by topic.
- Remote Online Notary in All 50 States: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/remote-online-notary-all-50-states/ — Secure remote online notarization nationwide with ID checks and audit trails.
- The Hidden Math Behind Renting vs Owning: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/renting-vs-owning-hidden-math/ — Opportunity cost, equity velocity, and inflation-adjusted rent.
- Full-Stack Dev and Landlord: What Software Gets Wrong: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/full-stack-dev-landlord-gaps/ — UX gaps in property software and better flows for tenants and owners.
- Commercial Real Estate 101: Tenant Mix and Cap Rates: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/commercial-real-estate-101-tenant-mix/ — Cap rates, NNN leases, and how tenant mix shapes CRE value.
- Crypto and Real Estate: A Barbell Hedge: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/crypto-and-real-estate-hedge/ — Balancing volatile assets with cashflowing rentals.
- New Landlord Mistakes and Systems That Prevent Them: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/new-landlord-mistakes-systems/ — Documentation, reserves, maintenance, and comms playbooks.
- Utah Rent vs Buy: Wasatch Front Playbook: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/utah-rent-vs-buy-wasatch-front/ — Corridor-specific math on taxes, transit, schools, and maintenance.
- Property Management Automation Checklist: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/property-management-automation-checklist/ — High-ROI automations for rent, maintenance, and owner reporting.
- Vacancy Risk Playbook: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/vacancy-risk-playbook/ — Model, reduce, and recover from vacancy with renewals and turns.
- Maintenance vs CapEx Strategy: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/maintenance-capex-strategy/ — Plan operating maintenance versus capital improvements.
- Dashboards for Landlords: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/dashboards-for-landlords/ — What owners and managers should track in one view.
- Building High-Performance Real Estate on Next.js and Supabase: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/building-high-performance-real-estate-nextjs-supabase/ — Technical architecture notes for a modern property platform.
- Engineering Real Estate Investment Calculators: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/engineering-real-estate-investment-calculators/ — How we model mortgage and investment math in the product.
- Modernizing Notary Workflows With Software: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/modernizing-notary-workflows-integration/ — Integrating RON and loan signing into real estate closings.
- Technical SEO for Real Estate Sites: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/technical-seo-for-real-estate/ — Structured data, sitemaps, and performance as ranking signals.
- Designing a Property Owner Portal: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/designing-property-owner-portal/ — Owner UX for finances, maintenance, and documents.
- Mobile Notary in Utah County: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/mobile-notary-utah-county-guide/ — Local guide to mobile notarization along the Wasatch Front.
- Remote Online Notary for Real Estate Closings: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/remote-online-notary-real-estate-closings/ — How RON fits lender and title workflows.
- Prepare for a Remote Online Notary Session: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/prepare-for-remote-online-notary-session/ — ID verification, tech checks, and witness tips.
- First-Time Home Buyer Guide: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/first-time-home-buyer-guide/ — Pre-approval through closing for Utah buyers.
- Property Management Tips for Utah Landlords: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/property-management-tips-utah-landlords/ — Vacancy, compliance, and tenant experience in Utah.
- Mortgage Rate Trends: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/mortgage-rate-trends-2025/ — Rate environment and what buyers and refinancers should watch.
- Why Utah Is a Strong Real Estate Investment Market: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/why-utah-best-real-estate-investment/ — Demographics, jobs, and housing demand in Utah.
- Home Staging Tips That Work: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/home-staging-tips-that-work/ — Prepare a listing to sell faster and for stronger offers.
- Understanding Property Taxes in Utah: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/understanding-property-taxes-utah/ — Assessments, Truth in Taxation, and investor implications.
- How to Choose a Property Management Company in Utah: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/how-to-choose-property-management-company-utah/ — Step-by-step guide to evaluating Utah property management companies — fees, services, and red flags.
- Utah Landlord-Tenant Law Guide: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/utah-landlord-tenant-law-guide/ — Security deposits, eviction timelines, habitability, and Fair Housing requirements in Utah.
- Salt Lake City Rental Market Report: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/salt-lake-city-rental-market-report/ — Vacancy rates, rents by submarket, and demand drivers for SLC landlords and investors.
- Property Management Fees in Utah: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/property-management-fees-utah/ — Transparent breakdown of Utah property management pricing — management fee, leasing fee, and markup structures.
- Best Neighborhoods to Invest in Utah Real Estate: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/best-neighborhoods-invest-utah-real-estate/ — Wasatch Front submarket breakdown: cash flow, appreciation, and vacancy by neighborhood.
- First-Time Landlord Checklist for Utah: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/first-time-landlord-checklist-utah/ — Everything to do before, during, and after your first tenant moves in to a Utah rental.
- FHA vs Conventional Loans in Utah: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/fha-vs-conventional-loans-utah/ — Side-by-side comparison of FHA and conventional mortgages for Utah home buyers.
- How Ondo RE Uses Technology to Manage Utah Rentals: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/how-ondo-re-uses-technology-property-management/ — Behind-the-scenes look at AI, owner portal, and automated workflows at Ondo RE.
- Provo and Orem Rental Market Guide: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/provo-orem-rental-market-guide/ — BYU, UVU, and Silicon Slopes demand — what landlords need to know in Utah County.
- Wasatch Front Real Estate Forecast 2026: https://ondorealestate.com/blog/wasatch-front-real-estate-forecast-2026/ — Interest rates, inventory, rent trends, and strategic positioning for Utah property owners.

- History: https://ondorealestate.com/about/history/ — Milestones and growth.
- Giving back: https://ondorealestate.com/about/giving-back/ — Community and nonprofit support.

- Company news: https://ondorealestate.com/about/news/ — Press and announcements.

### Solutions
- Solutions overview: https://ondorealestate.com/solutions/ — One platform for every stakeholder in real estate.
- For Investors: https://ondorealestate.com/solutions/investors/ — Portfolio analytics, risk scoring, and deal access.
- For Landlords: https://ondorealestate.com/solutions/landlords/ — Full-service management for property owners.
- For Property Managers: https://ondorealestate.com/solutions/property-managers/ — Scale operations with automation.
- For Tenants: https://ondorealestate.com/solutions/tenants/ — Rent, requests, and documents in one portal.
- Book a Demo: https://ondorealestate.com/demo/ — Free 15-minute platform walkthrough.
- Platform Tour: https://ondorealestate.com/tour/ — Self-serve guided tour of all platform features.
- Partners: https://ondorealestate.com/partners/ — Integrations: Stripe, Supabase, HubSpot, and more.
